perspectives.description: The employee is the person facing the dilemma of continuing a well-paying job that harms their mental health or quitting for personal well-being. Their decision directly impacts their happiness and family stability.

The spouse is the partner of the employee who is affected by the financial stability provided by the job but also concerned about the employee's mental health and overall happiness. Their emotional well-being is tied to the employee's state.

The child is the offspring of the employee and spouse, indirectly affected by the family's financial situation and the emotional climate at home. Their future well-being may be influenced by the parent's job satisfaction and mental health.
